sections: Open water swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships – Men's 25 km
first_paragraph: The Men's 25 km competition of the [Open water swimming events](/wiki/Open_water_swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Open water swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 23.

The Men's 25 km competition of the [Open water swimming events](/wiki/Open_water_swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Open water swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 23.

## Medalists

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Open_water_swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_25_km&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Medalists")]

| Gold | Silver | Bronze |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [Petar Stoychev](/wiki/Petar_Stoychev "Petar Stoychev") (BUL) | [Vladimir Dyatchin](/wiki/Vladimir_Dyatchin "Vladimir Dyatchin") (RUS) | [Csaba Gercsák](/wiki/Csaba_Gercs%C3%A1k "Csaba Gercsák") (HUN) |

## Results

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Open_water_swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_25_km&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Results")]

The final was held on July 23.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

| Rank | Swimmer | Nationality | Time |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1st place, gold medalist(s) | [Petar Stoychev](/wiki/Petar_Stoychev "Petar Stoychev") | [Bulgaria](/wiki/Bulgaria_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Bulgaria at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") | 5:10:39.8 |
| 2nd place, silver medalist(s) | [Vladimir Dyatchin](/wiki/Vladimir_Dyatchin "Vladimir Dyatchin") | [Russia](/wiki/Russia_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Russia at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") | 5:11:15.6 |
| 3rd place, bronze medalist(s) | [Csaba Gercsák](/wiki/Csaba_Gercs%C3%A1k "Csaba Gercsák") | [Hungary](/wiki/Hungary_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Hungary at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") | 5:11:18.1 |
